3 rules apply together: (1) Gate = vol ≥80% OR val ≥80%. (2) Slab rate uses MAX(vol%, val%) — higher achievement drives your per-case rate. (3) Disbursal incentive = ₹0 → total = ₹0 regardless of VAS or milestones earned.
